{{Short description|none}} <!-- This short description is INTENTIONALLY "none" - please see WP:SDNONE before you consider changing it! -->
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Tonga women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=September 2019}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name           = Tonga
| Badge          = Flag of Tonga.svg
| Nickname       = Tu’Ulalupe
| Association    = [[Tonga Football Association]] (TFA)
| Confederation  = [[Oceania Football Confederation|OFC]] (Oceania)
| Coach          = Vacant
| Captain        = [[Hemaloto Polovili]]
| Most caps      = [[Kilifi Uele]] (26)
| Top scorer     = [[Unaloto Feao]] (7)
| Home Stadium   = [[Loto-Tonga Soka Centre]]
| FIFA Trigramme = TGA
| FIFA Rank      = {{FIFA World Rankings|TGA}}
| FIFA max       = 163
| FIFA max date  = October 1998–December 1998
| FIFA min       = 211
| FIFA min date  = April 2018, July 2019
| Elo Rank       = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Tonga}}
| Elo max        = 180
| Elo max date   = August 1979
| Elo min        = 235
| Elo min date   = September 2019
| pattern_la1 = _tga24h
| pattern_b1  = _tga24h
| pattern_ra1 = _tga24h
| pattern_sh1 = _whitesides
| pattern_so1 = 
| leftarm1    = FF0000
| body1       = FF0000
| rightarm1   = FF0000
| shorts1     = FF0000
| socks1      = FF0000
| pattern_la2 = _tga24a
| pattern_b2  = _tga24a
| pattern_ra2 = _tga24a
| pattern_sh2 = _blacksides
| pattern_so2 = 
| leftarm2    = FFFFFF
| body2       = FFFFFF
| rightarm2   = FFFFFF
| shorts2     = FFFFFF
| socks2      = FFFFFF
| First game                   = {{fb|TAH|1946}} 8–0 {{fb-rt|TGA}} <br/> ([[Suva]], Fiji; 29 August 1979)
| Largest win                  = {{nowrap|{{fb|TGA}} 7–0 {{fb-rt|FSM}} <br/> ([[Nausori]], Fiji; 5 July 2003)}}
| Largest loss                 = {{fb|TGA}} [[Tonga 0–22 Australia|0–22]] {{fb-rt|AUS}} <br/> ([[Coffs Harbour]], Australia; 9 April 2001)
| World cup apps               = 
| World cup first              = 
| World cup best               = 
| Regional name                = [[OFC Nations Cup]]
| Regional cup apps            = 
| Regional cup first           = 
| Regional cup best            = 
| 2ndRegional name             = [[Football at the Pacific Games|Pacific Games]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps         = 6
| 2ndRegional cup first        = [[Football at the 1979 South Pacific Games|1979]]
| 2ndRegional cup best         = Consolation semi-finals ([[Football at the 1979 South Pacific Games|1979]])
}}

The '''Tonga men's national football team''' ({{langx|to|timi soka fakafonua ʻa Tonga}}) represents [[Tonga]] in men's international [[Association football|football]] and is controlled by the [[Tonga Football Association]], which is a part of the [[Oceania Football Confederation]].

==History==
On 9 April 2001, [[Tonga 0–22 Australia|Tonga lost 0–22 to Australia]], and the game became the highest scoring FIFA World Cup qualifying match. The match was an [[Oceania Football Confederation]] (OFC) [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (OFC)|first round qualifying match]] for the [[2002 FIFA World Cup]].<ref>{{Cite news |date=10 April 2001 |title=Australia set record |url=https://www.news24.com/xArchive/Sport/Soccer/Australia-set-record-20010410 |access-date=26 December 2025 |work=News24 |language=en}}</ref><ref name="soccerooseverygoal">{{Cite AV media |url=https://www.socceroos.com.au/video/aus-22-0-tonga-all-goals |title=All 22 goals from Australia v Tonga in 2001 |date=8 April 2020 |type=Video |work=Socceroos.com.au}}</ref>

==Information==

===Football in Tonga===
Tonga's greatest football triumph to date was their triumph in the first ever Polynesian Cup held in 1993 over [[Samoa national football team|Samoa]] and the [[Cook Islands national football team|Cook Islands]]. Although local players have not yet made their mark on big leagues abroad, the Chief Executive of the Tonga Football Association, Joe Topou, was appointed to the FIFA Executive Committee in 2002.

In July 2023, Tonga became unranked within the FIFA rankings due to not having played any matches since they lost 8-0 to [[Papua New Guinea national football team|Papua New Guinea]] on 18 July 2019.

===The second Goal project===
Tonga's second Goal project will develop and improve the national football academy and the association's headquarters in Atele, Tongatapu, which was built in the country's first Goal project. This development work has the aim that all of the Tonga Football Association's needs are fully satisfied. Local matches will be held at the football academy, while the administration's requirements, including the needs of players, officials and spectators, will also be covered. The football school will be transformed into a House of Football.{{clarify|date=January 2022}}

==Team image==
===Kit sponsorship===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:left;"
|-
! Kit supplier<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.oldfootballshirts.com/pt/teams/t/tonga/old-tonga-football-shirts-t4646.html |title=Antigo(a) Tonga camisas de futebol |access-date=4 April 2020 |archive-date=29 October 2021 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20211029173145/https://www.oldfootballshirts.com/pt/teams/t/tonga/old-tonga-football-shirts-t4646.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
! Period
|-
|align="Left"| {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Lotto Sport Italia|Lotto]] ||2007–2013
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Unknown}} OFC || 2014
|-
|align="left"| None || 2016–2019
|-
|align="left"| {{flagicon|Italy}} [[Lotto Sport Italia|Lotto]] || 2019–2024
|-
|align="Left|{{flagicon|U.S.A.}} [[Custom Athletics]] || 2025–
|}

==Fixtures and results==
{{Main|Tonga national football team results}}

==Coaching history==
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
* {{flagicon|TGA}} [[Tongia Nāpa'a]] (1979)
* {{Flagicon|West Germany}} [[Rudi Gutendorf]] (1981)
* {{Flagicon|Italy}} [[Umberto Mottini]] (1997–1998)
* {{Flagicon|Australia}} [[Gary Phillips (Soccer Player & Coach)|Gary Phillips]] (2001)
* {{Flagicon|Tonga}} [[Heinave Kaifa]] (2002–2003)
* {{Flagicon|SCG}} [[Milan Janković (footballer born 1959)|Milan Janković]] (2003–2005)
* {{flagicon|ENG}} [[Ben Perry (English football coach)|Ben Perry]] (2005–2006)
* {{flagicon|TGA}} [[Reece McLaughlin]] (2006–2007)
* {{Flagicon|Australia}} [[Chris Williams (football manager)|Chris Williams]] (2011)
* {{Flagicon|Tonga}} [[Timote Moleni]] (2015–2023)
* {{flagicon|TGA}} [[Kilifi Uele]] (2024–2025)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification (OFC)|2026 World Cup qualification]] matches in September 2024.<ref>{{cite web |title=Tuʻulalupe Squad |url=https://www.facebook.com/TongaFootball/posts/pfbid0Jh2uwfwKQcN7LuZ8WuNqK28ZJNZMUS4ccwaYQQfEujF6qE2LVmz8GseGRu2TzTkBl |website=Facebook |publisher=Tonga Football}}</ref>

''Caps and goals updated as of 9 September 2024, after the game against [[Samoa national football team|Samoa]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Semisi ‘Otukolo]]|age={{bda|1999|6|23|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Unaloto Pahulu]]|age={{bda|2006|10|18|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Folaha FC|Folaha]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kulisitofa Kite]]|age={{bda|2003|1|17|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=1|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Petelo Naniseni]]|age={{bda|2003|12|20|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Navutoka FC|Navutoka]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[David-John Tuamoheloa]]|age={{bda|2004|6|30|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0||club=[[Manukau United FC|Manukau United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Petelo Manu]]|age={{bda|2005|12|19|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Marist Prems|Marist]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Viliami Tikoipau]]|age={{bda|2001|1|7|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=1|club=[[Manukau United FC|Manukau United]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Utu'one Lea'aetoa]]|age={{bda|2005|2|16|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Fineasi Palei]]|age={{bda|1989|5|20|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[Launceston City Football Club|Launceston City]]|clubnat=AUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Christopher Kefu]]|age={{bda|2003|2|11|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ulafala Sonasi]]|age={{bda|2007|7|28|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=1|club=[[Marist Prems|Marist]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Topuluka Tuamoheloa]]|age={{bda|2003|11|28|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Lower Hutt City AFC|Lower Hutt City]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Va'inga Teu]]|age={{bda|2006|2|12|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Fahefa FC|Fahefa]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tomasi Armitage]]|age={{bda|2005|5|26|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Waikato Unicol AFC|Waikato Unicol]]|clubnat=NZL}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Hakeai Fonua]]|age={{bda|2008|9|1|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[FC Ahau|Ahau]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Herick Funaki]]|age={{bda|2003|8|7|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Longolongo FC|Longolongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Maikeli Lomu]]|age={{bda|1997|10|29|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Hemaloto Polovili]]|age={{bda|1997|7|27|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=4|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Lisiate Feke]]|age={{bda|2004|3|25|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Amoni Fifita]]|age={{bda|2004|6|26|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=3|club=[[Makave FC|Makave]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Vilikisepi Tai]]|age={{bda|2006|2|24|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Fahefa FC|Fahefa]]|clubnat=TGA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Viliami Tukia]]|age={{bda|2001|1|7|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lami F.C.|Lami]]|clubnat=FIJ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ata Inia]]|age={{bda|2000|4|25|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Chanthaburi F.C.|Chanthaburi]]|clubnat=THA}}
{{National football squad end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have been called up within the last 12 months.
<!--Sorted by position, most recent call-up, caps, goals and last name.-->
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Nimilote Moala]]|age={{bda|2003|7|18|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Justin Toetu’u]]|age={{bda|2003|5|19|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Longolongo FC|Longolongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Atieli 'Aho]]|age={{bda|2007|1|23|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Nukuhetulu FC|Nukuhetulu]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|SAM}}; 9 September 2024 <sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Laulea Taufa]]|age={{bda|1999|7|14|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sione Talia'uli]]|age={{bda|2006|5|29|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Fasi-Moe-Afi FC|Fasi-Moe-Afi]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sione Tu’ifangaloka]]|age={{bda|1999|4|24|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nicolas Vea]]|age={{bda|2003|10|31|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Navutoka FC|Navutoka]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Fakaofo Tonga]]|age={{bda|2004|10|29|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Navutoka FC|Navutoka]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ta’u Tupou]]|age={{bda|2000|11|28|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Vava'u FC|Vava'u]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kamaliele Papani]]|age={{bda|1984|4|8|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Vai Lutu]]|age={{bda|1999|9|30|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tuia Falepapalangi]]|age={{bda|2000|7|15|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Mohammed Rajani]]|age={{bda|1999|4|19|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[Rockdale Ilinden FC|Rockdale Ilinden]]|clubnat=AUS|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tau’aika Sonasi]]|age={{bda|1999|11|28|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Marist Prems|Marist]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Petueli Tokotaha]]|age={{bda|2000|9|10|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=2|club=[[Navutoka FC|Navutoka]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Petueli Tokotaha]]|age={{bda|2004|3|25|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Longolongo FC|Longolongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Taniela Vaka’uta]]|age={{bda|2002|11|4|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Folaha FC|Folaha]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Lafaela Moala]]|age={{bda|1982|7|22|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=''Unattached''|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|SAM}}; 9 September 2024 <sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Elias Kendler]]|age={{bda|2000|4|4|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=1|club=[[Haʻamoko United Youth]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Feki Tufi]]|age={{bda|2000|4|11|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Veitongo FC|Veitongo]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[William Foliaki]]|age={{bda|1999|2|11|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=''Unknown''|clubnat=|latest=v. {{fb|COK}}; 26 March 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Nuku ‘Esau]]|age={{bda|2001|6|12|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Navutoka FC|Navutoka]]|clubnat=TGA|latest=[[2023 Pacific Games]]}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|9 September 2024}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Tonga |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/188/Tonga.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Tonga.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!class="unsortable" style="width:175px;"|Name
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
!class="unsortable" style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|align=left|[[Kilifi Uele]]
|26
|3
|1996–2017
|-
|rowspan=2|2
|align=left|[[:es:Unaloto Feao|Unaloto Fea'o]]
|17
|7
|2001–2017
|-
|align=left|'''[[:fr:Hemaloto Polovili|Hemaloto Polovili]]'''
|17
|4
|2015–present
|-
|4
|align=left|[[Lafaele Moala]]
|16
|1
|2003–2015
|-
|rowspan=2|5
|align=left|[[:it:Folio Moeaki|Folio Moeaki]]
|15
|0
|2004–2015
|-
|align=left|[[:pl:Sione Uhatahi|Sione Uhatahi]]
|15
|1
|2007–2019
|-
|rowspan=2|7
|align=left|[[Siu'a Ma'amaloa]]
|14
|1
|2001–2004
|-
|align=left|'''[[Kamaliele Papani]]'''
|14
|0
|2003–present
|-
|rowspan=2|9
|align=left|'''[[Semisi 'Otukolo]]'''
|12
|0
|2017–present
|-
|align=left|'''[[Fineasi Palei]]'''
|12
|0
|2011–present 
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{|class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!class="unsortable" width=150px|Name
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
!class="unsortable" width=100px|Career
|-
|1
|align="left"|[[:es:Unaloto Feao|Unaloto Fea'o]]
|7
|17
|{{#expr:7/17 round 2}}
|2001–2017
|-
|2
|align="left"|[[Lokoua Taufahema]]
|5
|7
|{{#expr:5/7 round 2}}
|2001–2011
|-
|3
|align="left"|'''[[:fr:Hemaloto Polovili|Hemaloto Polovili]]'''
|4
|17
|{{#expr:4/17 round 2}}
|2015–present
|-
|rowspan=4|4
|align="left"|[[Amone Suli]]
|3
|1
|{{#expr:3/1 round 2}}
|2002
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Amoni Fifita]]'''
|3
|8
|{{#expr:3/8 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|align="left"|[[Mark Uhatahi]]
|3
|11
|{{#expr:3/11 round 2}}
|2003–2015
|-
|align="left"|[[Kilifi Uele]]
|3
|26
|{{#expr:3/26 round 2}}
|1996–2017
|-
|rowspan=5|8
|align="left"|[[Ma'ake Uhatahi]]
|2
|2
|{{#expr:2/2 round 2}}
|2009
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Petueli Tokotaha]]'''
|2
|6
|{{#expr:2/6 round 2}}
|2017–present
|-
|align="left"|[[Pio Palu]]
|2
|7
|{{#expr:2/7 round 2}}
|2007–2011
|-
|align="left"|[[Timote Moleni]]
|2
|8
|{{#expr:2/8 round 2}}
|1996–2001
|-
|align="left"|[[Filisione Taufahema]]
|2
|8
|{{#expr:2/8 round 2}}
|2001–2002
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan=38|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Host
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
|-
|colspan=2|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
|colspan=8|''Not member of FIFA''
|colspan=6|''Not member of FIFA''
|-
|[[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||align=left|{{flag|United States}}
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|[[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||align=left|{{flag|France|1974}}
|colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify'' 
|4
|2
|0
|2
|3
|13
|-
|[[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]||align=left|{{flag|South Korea|1997}}<br>{{flag|Japan}}
|4
|2
|0
|2
|7
|30
|-
|[[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]||align=left|{{flag|Germany}}
|4
|1
|0
|3
|2
|17
|-
|[[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]||align=left|{{flag|South Africa}}
|4
|1
|0
|3
|6
|10
|-
|[[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]||align=left|{{flag|Brazil}}
|3
|1
|1
|1
|4
|4
|-
|[[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]||align=left|{{flag|Russia}}
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|8
|-
|[[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]||align=left|{{flag|Qatar}}
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|[[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]||align=left|{{flag|Canada}}<br>{{flag|Mexico}}<br>{{flag|United States}}
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|1
|0
|1
|4
|3
|-
|[[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||align=left|{{flag|Morocco}}<br>{{flag|Portugal}}<br>{{flag|Spain}}
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|[[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]||align=left|{{flag|Saudi Arabia}}
|-
!colspan=2|Total
!—
!{{Tooltip|0/8|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!–
!–
!–
!–
!–
!–
!24
!8
!1
!15
!27
!85
|}

===OFC Nations Cup===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[OFC Men's Nations Cup|Oceania Cup / OFC Nations Cup]] record
!rowspan="26"|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|New Zealand}} [[1973 OFC Nations Cup|1973]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|New Caledonia|french}} [[1980 OFC Nations Cup|1980]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Pacific Community}} [[1996 OFC Nations Cup|1996]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|3
|1
|1
|1
|4
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|Australia}} [[1998 OFC Nations Cup|1998]]
|4
|1
|1
|2
|5
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|Tahiti}} [[2000 OFC Nations Cup|2000]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|4
|15
|-
|{{flagicon|New Zealand}} [[2002 OFC Nations Cup|2002]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|7
|18
|-
|{{flagicon|Australia}} [[2004 OFC Nations Cup|2004]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|2
|17
|-
|{{flagicon|Pacific Community}} [[2008 OFC Nations Cup|2008]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|6
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} [[2012 OFC Nations Cup|2012]]
|3
|1
|1
|1
|4
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|Papua New Guinea}} [[2016 OFC Nations Cup|2016]]
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|FIJ}} {{flagicon|VAN}} [[2024 OFC Men's Nations Cup|2024]]
|2||0||0||2||1||5
|-
!Total
!—
!0/11
!–
!–
!–
!–
!–
!–
!31
!7
!3
!21
!34
!90
|}

===Pacific Games===

{{col-begin}}
{{col-break}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[Football at the South Pacific Games|Pacific Games]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Fiji|colonial}} [[Football at the 1963 South Pacific Games|1963]]
|rowspan=5 colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|NCL|french}} [[Football at the 1966 South Pacific Games|1966]]
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG|1965}} [[Football at the 1969 South Pacific Games|1969]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TAH|1946}} [[Football at the 1971 South Pacific Games|1971]]
|-
|{{flagicon|GUM}} [[Football at the 1975 South Pacific Games|1975]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Fiji}} [[Football at the 1979 South Pacific Games|1979]]
|rowspan=2|Group stage
|7th
|4
|1
|0
|3
|5
|20
|-
|{{flagicon|Samoa|1948}} [[Football at the 1983 South Pacific Games|1983]]
|7th
|3
|1
|1
|1
|6
|8
|-
|{{flagicon|NCL|french}} [[Football at the 1987 South Pacific Games|1987]]
|rowspan=3 colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG}} [[Football at the 1991 South Pacific Games|1991]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TAH}} [[Football at the 1995 South Pacific Games|1995]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Fiji}} [[Football at the 2003 South Pacific Games|2003]]
|rowspan=2|Group stage
|7th
|4
|1
|1
|2
|9
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|Samoa}} [[Football at the 2007 South Pacific Games|2007]]
|7th
|4
|1
|0
|3
|6
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|NCL|football}} [[Men's Football at the 2011 Pacific Games|2011]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|PNG}} [[Men's Football at the 2015 Pacific Games|2015]]
|colspan=8|''N/A – tournament was U23''
|-
|{{flagicon|Samoa}} [[Men's Football at the 2019 Pacific Games|2019]]
|rowspan=2|Group stage
|11th
|4
|0
|0
|4
|0
|37
|-
|{{flagicon|SOL}} [[Football at the 2023 Pacific Games – Men's tournament|2023]]
|11th||4||1||0||3||7||13
|-
!Total
!Group stage
!6/16
!23
!5
!2
!17
!31
!98
|-
|}
{{col-break}}

===Pacific Mini Games===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[Football at the South Pacific Games|Pacific Mini Games]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Solomon Islands}} [[Football at the 1981 South Pacific Mini Games|1981]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Vanuatu}} [[Football at the 1993 South Pacific Mini Games|1993]]
|Group stage
|7th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|0
|19
|-
|{{flagicon|Vanuatu}} [[Football at the 2017 Pacific Mini Games – Men's tournament|2017]]
|Sixth place
|6th
|5
|0
|0
|5
|5
|25
|-
!Total
!Sixth place
!2/3
!8
!0
!0
!8
!5
!44
|-
|}

===Polynesia Cup===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[Polynesia Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|- style="background:silver;"
|{{flagicon|SAM}} [[Polynesia Cup 1994|1994]]
|'''Runners-up'''
|'''2nd'''
|'''3'''
|'''1'''
|'''1'''
|'''1'''
|'''4'''
|'''4'''
|- style="background:#9acdff;"
|{{flagicon|COK}} [[Polynesia Cup 1998|1998]]
|'''Fourth place'''
|'''4th'''
|'''4'''
|'''1'''
|'''1'''
|'''2'''
|'''5'''
|'''9'''
|- style="background:#9acdff;"
|{{flagicon|TAH}} [[Polynesia Cup 2000|2000]]
|'''Fourth place'''
|'''4th'''
|'''4'''
|'''1'''
|'''0'''
|'''3'''
|'''4'''
|'''15'''
|-
!Total
!Runners-up
!3/3
!11
!3
!2
!6
!13
!28
|-
|}
{{col-end}}

==Head-to-head record==
''Up to matches played on 6 September 2024.''
{{#lst:Tonga national football team results|Record by opponent}}

==Honours==
===Regional===
* '''[[Polynesia Cup]]'''
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (1): [[1994 Polynesia Cup|1994]]

==Historical kits==
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _whiteborder
| pattern_b  = _white_collar
| pattern_ra = _whiteborder
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = _color_2_stripes_white
| leftarm = FF0000
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FF0000
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2001 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _redborder
| pattern_b  = _open_collar_onwhite
| pattern_ra = _redborder
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = _color_2_stripes_red
| leftarm = FFFFFF
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2001 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _TGA2009H
| pattern_b  = _TGA2009H
| pattern_ra = _TGA2009H
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = 
| body    = 
| rightarm = 
| shorts   = FF0000
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2009 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _TGA2009A
| pattern_b  = _TGA2009A
| pattern_ra = _TGA2009A
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = 
| body    = 
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2009 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _lotto2011white
| pattern_b  = _lotto2011white
| pattern_ra = _lotto2011white
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FF0000
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FF0000
| shorts   = FF0000
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2011 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _lotto2011red
| pattern_b  = _lotto2011red
| pattern_ra = _lotto2011red
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FFFFFF
| body    = FFFFFF
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2011 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _OFC2015white
| pattern_b  = _OFC2015white
| pattern_ra = _OFC2015white
| pattern_sh = _white_border
| pattern_so = _2_white_stripes2
| leftarm = FF0000
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FF0000
| shorts   = FF0000
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2015 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _OFC2015red
| pattern_b  = _OFC2015red
| pattern_ra = _OFC2015red
| pattern_sh = _red_border
| pattern_so = _2_red_stripes
| leftarm = FFFFFF
| body    = FFFFFF
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2015 Away
}}
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _adidasblack
| pattern_b  = _black_v_neck_w_adidas_stripes
| pattern_ra = _adidasblack
| pattern_sh = _black_under_border
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FF0000
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FF0000
| shorts   = FF0000
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2017 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _adidas_red
| pattern_b  = _Adidas_red_collar_vintage
| pattern_ra = _adidas_red
| pattern_sh = _red_stripes
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FFFFFF
| body    = FFFFFF
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2017 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _redborder
| pattern_b  = _tga19h
| pattern_ra = _redborder
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FF0000
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FF0000
| shorts   = FF0000
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2019 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = _blackborder
| pattern_b  = _tga19a
| pattern_ra = _blackborder
| pattern_sh = 
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FFFFFF
| body    = FFFFFF
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2019 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = 
| pattern_b  = _lotto_logo_white_detailed
| pattern_ra = 
| pattern_sh = _lotto_logo_white_right
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FF0000
| body    = FF0000
| rightarm = FF0000
| shorts   = FF0000
| socks = FF0000
| title = 2023 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit
| pattern_la = 
| pattern_b  = _lotto_logo_red_detailed
| pattern_ra = 
| pattern_sh = _lotto_logo_red_right
| pattern_so = 
| leftarm = FFFFFF
| body    = FFFFFF
| rightarm = FFFFFF
| shorts   = FFFFFF
| socks = FFFFFF
| title = 2023 Away
}}
|}

Sources:<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjZRc-AvZbQUceCOnKExHnQqEhQh22JhhgbPWjabxPnvZewkirro_SxyQqPaqAtkQi4VDF603ooZ1_n2v2Fd6Uv6Ojs-pfk_RwjbE0Ka2RGM_doWWjqc4SDASsCB29wU6efuhr2twwnS11zRDm-14nVH2txkyyrrN0svzfeVdslhakpur-qSmw5vI1H1TU/s718/tonga%202001%20o.jpg | title= 2001}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEgqzbcNDKs_QA57UTUO4EkhuTu94uXIGzXupXSjbq37voJy_Ve3k_jIi4GG6AWEZ1qH6z8tinvKz5-Cy6Wv2Sr1r2DnsrQBKZgUDoTKlNS-qyiVuvypmBii5rW7k5tZ-wxQ9moCaHYYDAbDEtzVWRmBeDo3IVt0VV1t8ATNBlcWXYUVg8DO9DTqA2m7kE0/s1240/tonga%202001%20samoa%201%20a0.jpg | title= 2001}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.footballkitarchive.com/es/tonga-2010-away-kit/ | title= 2009}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjtQnu6uFU9j3IeE1KP72FpvEkjPp65XFdz3UQd2rtgWg58qujs_9hCDnRYovICoC0xyjN0qmACwqjNETSSyC1pG8DyMb1XtRu5wdcwJtBrZ2KteHkJ5V2bwkMXZRMrS_ina4tz92_klYlWR29yFn3YXWmbJqTDuDgSfexCTKxloppD9HM4-JaLj1rqsQY/s604/tonga%202009%20w.jpg | title= 2009}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEhecVGhDJZsAvKBlZeXAjULcoerf9mMDJ5LvZaF0pQnjowvTXkEzjYwA5_4HlVMoqxbti8pCnCU1nED5Dhy6oORZbtP5iF5YO_1AMazLKDBWSiSLOmPyiffResHWWpTfwOOt2BPihlKFS0ebE6P8shZmNIZx1vDcpOKNplcKpmAiAo5K8_iXxfgXnb-7ws/w640-h426/tonga%202011%20dj.jpg | title= 2011}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEio1Q1UH517fcMkYmkRk7j9NC9AXcM1fjY2I9q4kgkIDqiuZff9NFNQwqdFz9eyIHf1ucgtJXXQAgr0CMJvz75zB-ISMh1OaauzfbiqlMKr0jHM3LzwNjFfwGB1qMxYXnVuQtSnQHM_wgQ0cVwtQ3TRm1wKtSgwS7t57n8CiHIuSl351VTD3ElDN4k6Ihs/w640-h424/tonga%202015%20ejfi.jpg | title= 2011}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEisszzeGw8Pm6gSdUnToxLiBY-5bouQDVO_slNF-yy0wJDagXpAh1IvbNhYuqMHdKb_ctAkBe27EOHjkDQTodnO95Fal2apkR2yprO5X1v-oQcJPcGhs1fuewc06hndjs3Pvv42cOEhcuhpZdky2EChf4GkA5s8O0E-8UdO_A4yypc7rVYyg1-NOzW4vGQ/s2048/tonga%202015%20fpe.jpg | title= 2015}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEi3J7hY7Qplcfr7SgPtkF65ofgpEslwmWWpqIcVRBEpo3NPxkQNgZsziDlFgdIR16E9tK3EUOWD3YXX9UBul1fgjuN_0e1RjTQC6RFlfZ2itcUAzAo100k3xdNGjnCESeARtbvp22G-2dFS7_KskZt3lh6fQmY4hAL2nVbmhOVHjhjlwfh_aez9WOJVSVc/s960/tonga%202015%20mc.jpg | title= 2015}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEhGrw72GNQMFage8EzQhtFOBz02EirleTh0FNAM3UnWhsVQxs1rK83VxDdmIElpiFswFG1u8YXvXgTPv2hbhnb5gYqT4pZ5Nu_EhJrNvBdsj0NCg2yGfF6uuY9_5S1Ckd702IcLb_t1jH3C8CqHsWZo41qMoxtbK1xrH_cGj3lJmQuYM3sjh-5Ol1ayS3A/s960/tonga%202017%20wdp.jpg | title= 2017}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjLOittrosUlJcPvk-TydkofFgF6yRlS-jjh3cu3ayoY_lIsfEow_VSBRR2ISzpEJNwM9i0jShKEviHJD2w58MsAe1wzKM9-toD4xDzN8lUnVoVLW9lf2e4fNeNYViJkqI0nt7ou5ZnUfX7V4Bcl3u34ysb_yx5LtEliVWDs30MEOqdTNj4mIkvpExf71c/s1128/tonga%202017%20tuvalu%203a4.jpg | title= 2017}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEij4_GI48-OfOdu4JilYi1dcNE082fYAbl2S3YOzGAWlgffKUxLV3Uz2dmUoISaKFSoBr7M7hO5h_QnurQAZI5i4LGlzHnrqnKwYOg5HbGDE0LmvgE1U-u9sq2YzFJAFEa9W1g8GGYs9MZXk8X9hdhFzKviT293erVl_EcqBHYHE6rG3F9_pXL91WU_rUM/s960/tonga%202019%20pjfe.jpg | title= 2019}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEgsgjxKUO5VdqXN4w3uLwKwQwxp3nqe7zHp0yMsIF9LjeE-K0qb1OAC2E0XX9k9ID9s9tMJY8mJMStpBZu0ss4mObCLjBjJSrcMuGfxdqY0_IhF8cdzgI8k-SekZZHbHFWtjfFs980NJxmfak50R7SZFjUeBacyAPj3i5Iu7ZUYM1fNMd7f6RPpsmYgZ0g/s1791/tonga%202019%20wfop.jpg | title= 2019}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZhCCLsnDMY0 | title= 2023| website= [[YouTube]]| date= 18 November 2023}}</ref>

==See also==
* [[Tonga national under-23 football team]]
* [[Tonga national under-20 football team]]
* [[Tonga national under-17 football team]]
* [[Tonga women's national football team]]
* [[Tonga women's national under-20 football team]]

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
{{commonscat}}
* [https://www.oceaniafootball.com/tonga/ Tonga] at [[Oceania Football Confederation|OFC]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/TGA Tonga] at [[FIFA]]

{{Tonga national football team}}
{{Tonga national football team managers}}
{{Football in Tonga}}
{{OFC teams}}
{{National sports teams of Tonga}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Tonga Men's National Football Team}}
[[Category:Tonga national football team| ]]
[[Category:Tonga men's national football teams| ]]
[[Category:Oceanian national association football teams]]
